description: You are a public finance analyst at a municipal advisory firm. Review and correct the draft Official Statement for the City of Greenfield's General Obligation Bonds, Series 2024A located at /home/ga/Documents/os_draft_greenfield.docx. The document, prepared by a junior analyst, contains errors in bond terms, financial tables, totals, MSRB-required disclosures, and formatting. Ensure the final version complies with SEC Rule 15c2-12 and MSRB Rule G-32 requirements and save the corrected document to /home/ga/Documents/os_draft_greenfield.docx.

metadata.data_source: Based on EMMA municipal bond filing patterns and MSRB disclosure standards
